title: lasianthus cyaneus
intro: Lasianthus cyaneus, also known as the Blue Lasianthus or Blue Mountain Laurel, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of the Western Ghats in India. It is a shrub that has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant support. In herbal preparations, Lasianthus cyaneus is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
